formations_blocks: Turkey building possession with wide attacks
Paraguay central compactness/shape to block inside lanes
key_matchups: Matias Galarza vs Turkey's penalty-area space
Arda Guler vs Paraguay's counter-pressing recovery
phases.summary: Paraguay struck almost immediately through Galarza and then stayed aggressive, pressing high while remaining compact in central areas. Turkey gradually took more of the ball and found width on both flanks, but Paraguay repeatedly clogged the middle and forced them into wider, lower-quality crossing and shooting positions.

formations_blocks: Paraguay five at the back off the ball
Turkey sustained attacking phase with pressure high up the pitch
adjustments: Paraguay dropped into a back five in defensive phases
Turkey repeatedly funneled attacks through Yildiz on the left and Akgun/Guler on the right
key_matchups: Turkey attackers vs Paraguay’s two-bank defensive line in the middle
Yildiz vs Paraguay’s physical right-side defending
Almiron and Pitta vs Turkey’s back line on the counter
phases.summary: Turkey took control of possession and territory, probing wide on both flanks and repeatedly forcing corners and free kicks. Paraguay responded by stacking five at the back off the ball and defending very physically, looking to counter through Almiron and Pitta, but Turkey kept pinning them deep without finding a breakthrough.

adjustments: Paraguay reduced to 10 men after Miguel Almiron’s red card for covering his mouth
Turkey had dominated the ball with 72% possession but had not yet turned control into a clear equaliser
Match likely to become more one-sided in Turkey’s favour after the sending-off, though no explicit shape change is described
phases.summary: Turkey go into half-time trailing 0-1 despite having had most of the ball and more attacking output, with 72% possession, 12 shots and 5 corners. The key tactical turning point is Paraguay’s direct red card for Miguel Almiron, which leaves them a man down and potentially makes Turkey’s chase for an equaliser much more favourable. Still, the commentary suggests Turkey’s control has not yet translated into genuine threat, with the game previously looking like a possible smash-and-grab for Paraguay.

formations_blocks: Paraguay deep block / two deep lines behind the ball
Paraguay effectively parked in their own penalty area
Turkey sustained attacking pressure against a 10-man defensive set-up
adjustments: Paraguay’s red-card situation forces them to sit deeper, with Enciso as the only advanced player
Turkey increase width and directness through Yildiz on the left and Guler from corners
Turkey overload the box with crosses and second-ball pressure
key_matchups: Enciso vs multiple Turkey defenders in transition and around the box
Kenan Yildiz vs Paraguayan defenders on the left side of the box
Guler’s corner delivery vs Gomez at the near post
Calhanoglu’s cross vs Paraguayan aerial/box defence
Yilmaz vs a Paraguayan defender in the shoulder-to-shoulder challenge
phases.summary: This phase is dominated by Paraguay’s 10-man low block, with the visitors retreating into two deep lines and leaving Enciso as the lone outlet. Turkey respond with relentless pressure, using Yildiz’s dribbling, Guler’s set-piece delivery and Calhanoglu’s crossing to probe the box, though Paraguay repeatedly survive with clearances and last-ditch defending. Enciso still provides Paraguay’s main counter threat, driving forward almost single-handedly whenever they can break.

formations_blocks: Turkey sustained attacking pressure with repeated corners and open-play attacks around Paraguay's box
Paraguay defending deep under sustained pressure, with moments of counter-threatening set-piece play
adjustments: Paraguay substitution: Caceres off, Alexandro Maidana on (82')
key_matchups: Calhanoglu vs Gomez (shot to the head, stoppage)
Bardakci vs Galarza (challenge on Paraguay's scorer)
Cakir vs Paraguay's set-piece/near-post threat at the far post (84')
phases.summary: Turkey dominated the closing spell, piling on pressure through corners, crosses and waves of attacks, but Paraguay still threatened from a dangerous free kick and other set-piece moments. The phase was frantic and physical, with notable stoppages, a risky challenge on Galarza, and late substitutions as both teams tried to manage the final minutes.
